recent_calls.summary: The user repeatedly requested to speak with an operator, and the agent attempted to transfer the call to a live agent as requested. The call was successfully transferred shortly after the user's request.
The user, Yolanda, called and requested to speak with someone. The agent, Sophie, promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Bob called to schedule a service appointment for his air conditioning not cooling under his American Palm Shield home warranty. The agent collected all necessary details including the dispatch number and preferred timing, and confirmed the information with Bob. Bob declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests, and the call ended with the agent confirming that someone will contact him soon.

The user called to schedule an immediate service visit for their sister's air conditioning unit, which was not cooling properly. The agent confirmed the service address, contact details, and the urgency of the request, and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would reach out shortly. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call.
The user called and requested to speak with Amy. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.

The user called to make a payment and requested to speak to Amy. The agent informed the user that billing information is not directly accessible and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.
The agent greeted the user and offered assistance, but the user indicated they needed to call back and ended the call shortly after. No specific service or information was discussed.

The user, Jaunice, scheduled a service appointment for a non-working cooling system at her home on Friday between 8 and 10 AM. The agent confirmed the booking and informed her about the dispatch fee. The user declined to provide feedback and ended the call politely.

Felicia from American Home Shield called Budget regarding a dispatch and provided the dispatch number. She requested to speak to a live agent, and the call was successfully transferred to another agent for further assistance.

The user called to set up a service appointment for their cooling system through American Home Shield, reporting that their AC unit is not coming on. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The user called and requested to be connected with Dan Lagars. The agent attempted to transfer the call to the requested contact and successfully completed the transfer.
The user called and requested to speak with an operator. The agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent to assist the user further.
The user called and requested to speak to someone else. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.
The user requested to speak with another representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to reach the dispatcher responsible for sending an AC technician to their house but was unable to get through. The agent attempted to assist by transferring the call to a live agent who could help. The call was successfully transferred to another number.

The user called to schedule a service visit related to a home warranty for their cooling system. The agent attempted to gather more details but the user requested to speak directly with a representative. The call was then transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

Caroline called to schedule an HVAC service appointment under her home warranty due to little to no airflow. The agent collected all necessary details and offered information about maintenance programs, which Caroline declined, requesting to speak with a representative instead. The call was then successfully transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to follow up on a part delivery and mentioned previous communication with another person. The agent attempted to assist but ultimately transferred the call to a live agent for further help.
The user requested to speak with Amy, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate person successfully. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to inquire about the scheduled visit of the AC technician to the Jim Boler Bolinger residence in Richmond Heights. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.

Victoria Brown called to confirm her appointment with Budget Heating, Cooling and Plumbing. The agent verified her details and confirmed the appointment scheduled with technician Devon between 2:30 and 3:30 PM. The call ended after confirming no further assistance was needed.

The user reported that the technician sent for their AC unit appointment was not qualified to work on the equipment and requested to reschedule the appointment for today or tomorrow, otherwise they would cancel. The agent acknowledged the issue, confirmed the user's contact details and service address, and assured that the team would follow up to confirm the rescheduling or cancellation. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further questions.

The user called to inquire about the status of their dog's grooming appointment and whether they could pick up their dog. The agent was unable to provide real-time updates and transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the call was promptly transferred to another agent for further assistance.

The user, Jennifer Clayton, called to clarify the details of her appointment, which appeared to be scheduled for all day instead of the expected time. The agent confirmed her identity and phone number before transferring the call to a live operator for further assistance.

The user called to report that their last name was spelled incorrectly on a document they received for signing. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called to inquire about a technician reportedly at their property. The agent was unable to provide real-time updates and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called Budget and mentioned being contracted by American Home Shield. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

The user called to set up an appointment and provided their ZIP code, which was confirmed to be in the service area. The agent then transferred the call to a live agent who could assist with the appointment setup.

The user called to inquire about financing options for a new system. The agent explained the financing process and offered to start an evaluation, but the user requested to speak with a live representative. The call was then transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

Melissa called to schedule a follow-up air conditioning service through American Home Shield to fix the compressor at her home in Collinsville, Illinois. The agent confirmed the details and informed her that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact her shortly. Melissa declined information about maintenance programs but provided positive feedback about the service speed and timeliness.

The user, Crystal Swingle, requested urgent service to light her hot water heater and was provided with available appointment slots. She asked for a quote but decided to call back later to confirm the appointment. The call ended with the user expressing thanks and no immediate booking was finalized.
The call was very brief with minimal interaction, and the user hung up shortly after the agent introduced herself.

The user expressed frustration that the call was disconnected and requested to speak with a human agent. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to a human agent, and the initial agent transferred the call to a live agent successfully. The call lasted 16 seconds and ended with a call transfer.

The user called to report that their air conditioner is running but not cooling well and requested service as soon as possible due to upcoming hot weather. The agent collected the service address, contact information, and preferred scheduling times, confirming the details with the user. The request was successfully passed along for follow-up by a human agent.

The user, Danielle Mosley, called to provide a status for an inspection but no appointment was found under her information. She requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call.
The agent attempted to assist the user but due to inaudible speech and uncertainty about outgoing calls, the call was transferred to a live agent for further help.
The user called Budget seeking to speak directly with a person. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help.
The user called and requested to speak to the front desk. The agent attempted to transfer the call to a live agent who could assist further, and the transfer was successful.

The user called after receiving a text message from a representative and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent acknowledged the user's request and successfully completed the call transfer.
The user called and requested to speak to a representative. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to inquire if the office was open and requested to speak to the front desk. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent and successfully transferred the call. No further conversation occurred after the transfer.

Christopher called to inform that the replacement cartridge for a previous plumbing service has arrived and requested the same plumber to return for installation. The agent confirmed the details, including the service address and contact number, and arranged for the team to call Christopher in the morning to schedule the appointment. Christopher declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

Rick from Home Security of America called to request a second opinion work order for a combo heating and air conditioning unit that was fully denied. The agent collected all necessary details including service address, dispatch number, and appointment preference, and confirmed no special instructions. Rick declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback on the virtual assistant.

The user, Hannah, called after hours to inquire about a specific dispatch and requested a callback from a live agent. The agent informed her that live agents are unavailable after hours but documented her request for a follow-up on the next business day. Hannah also asked for an update regarding an AC and requested the office to contact her.

The user called after hours requesting to speak to a live representative. The agent informed the user that live representatives were unavailable but offered to take information for a callback. The user declined and said they would call back tomorrow.

The user called to follow up on a callback from Rich, the service manager, who had visited their house but did not return the call as promised. The agent documented the user's message and informed them that someone would reach out on the next business day. The user did not request any further assistance during the call.
No conversation happened.
